role: Doctorate in Medicine (MD) – Oligodendroglial Disorders in Schizophrenia
description: Summa cum laude MD thesis on oligodendroglial disorders in schizophrenia, including development of a novel image-based cell recognition workflow and primary responsibility for statistical analysis; published in top-tier journals such as Translational Psychiatry and Cells.

role: Medical School – Focus on Neurology & Psychotherapy
description: Completed medical school with focus on neurology and psychotherapy and received long-term scholarships from LMU (FöFoLe) and others.
Introductory studies in cognitive science with a strong quantitative foundation in mathematics, informatics, statistics, and psychology.

Worked on reactive (variational) message-passing algorithms in open-source Julia ecosystems (RxInfer.jl, GraphPPL.jl, ReactiveMP.jl), self-studied Bayesian machine learning, and created tutorials on inference-as-planning and parameter learning; contributed to an automatic research discovery project combining LLMs with active inference.

company: Top-ranked hospitals in Germany, Denmark, Italy & Tanzania
role: Clinical Electives – Psychiatry, Internal Medicine, Surgery, General Medicine
description: Completed 16 months of clinical electives across psychiatry, internal medicine, surgery, and general medicine in several leading international hospitals.
Short-term research stay in neurobiology, broadening international research experience and exposure to different scientific environments.

company: LMU – Office of the Dean of Research of Medicine
description: Developed a Python-based automation pipeline that increased the number of published research articles by approximately 50%, supporting communication and visibility of medical research.
